recommendations.title: The Soft Skin
recommendations.overview: Pierre Lachenay is a well-known publisher and lecturer, married to Franca and father of Sabine. He starts a love affair with air hostess Nicole, which Pierre is hiding, but he cannot stay away from her.

recommendations.title: Day for Night
recommendations.overview: A committed filmmaker struggles to complete his latest project while coping with a myriad of crises, personal and professional, among the cast and crew.

recommendations.title: The Bride Wore Black
recommendations.overview: Julie Kohler is prevented from suicide by her mother. She leaves home, with the intent track down, charm and kill five men who do not know her. What is her goal? What is her purpose?

recommendations.title: The Woman Next Door
recommendations.overview: Two ex-lovers wind up living next door to each other with their respective spouses. Forbidden passions ensue.

recommendations.title: Jules and Jim
recommendations.overview: In the carefree days before World War I, introverted Austrian author Jules strikes up a friendship with the exuberant Frenchman Jim and both men fall for the impulsive and beautiful Catherine.

recommendations.title: The Wild Child
recommendations.overview: In a French forest circa 1798, a child–who cannot walk, speak, read or write–is found. A doctor becomes interested in the case and patiently attempts to civilise the boy.

recommendations.title: The Last Metro
recommendations.overview: In occupied Paris, an actress wed to a Jewish theater owner must keep him hidden from the Nazis while doing both of their jobs.

recommendations.title: The Story of Adèle H.
recommendations.overview: In the 19th century a mysterious woman named Adele H. crosses the ocean, from Europe to North America, to relentlessly pursue a handsome officer that denies her satisfaction.

recommendations.title: Love on the Run
recommendations.overview: Now in his thirties, Antoine Doinel is a divorced proofreader in love with a record seller. Colette Tazzi, now a lawyer, buys his first published autobiography, leading them to a chance meeting.

recommendations.title: Small Change
recommendations.overview: The lives of a motherless young man, who's just starting to find interest in women, and his physically abused, poverty stricken friend, are mixed with more or less innocent childhood experiences and challenges most their age experience.
